description: Draft matches the standard form verbatim except the counterparty has rewritten sec-8 (Limitation on Liability) to delete the $150,000 mutual aggregate liability cap and the consequential-damages waiver, replacing it with an uncapped liability clause. This exercises an on_remove_or_alter detector (preserve-liability-cap, preserve-consequential-damages-waiver) and must produce a deleted/modified hunk anchored to sec-8 carrying a source_text_hash for the redline-patching path (issue #17).

draft.heading: Limitation on Liability
draft.text: EACH PARTY'S LIABILITY UNDER THIS AGREEMENT SHALL BE UNCAPPED AND UNLIMITED, AND NEITHER PARTY WAIVES ANY CLAIM FOR CONSEQUENTIAL, SPECIAL, PUNITIVE, INCIDENTAL, OR INDIRECT DAMAGES.
